input.memoryNote: You showed up to our group Halloween costume party dressed as 'the concept of capitalism' wearing a suit with price tags zip-tied to every item including your tie, shoes, and your own face. There was a sticker on your forehead that said $4.99. You won. You always win.

meta.tiktokHook: My best friend showed up to our costume party dressed as 'the concept of capitalism'. Suit. Price tags on everything. Sticker on his forehead: $4.99. He won. Obviously.
